<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Facebook clone project named "CampusX" aimed at students. The "backend" folder contained database, server and rest-api implementation. It is mostly complete so focus on fronend for now.

The frontend is located in "frontend2" folder. Ignore "frontend" folder. It is a Vue 3 + Vite + Tailwind CSS project which aims to clone Facebook ui. Use best practices for Vue component structure and Tailwind utility classes. Use the api declared in "backend" for all needs.

Use tailwind exclusively. Don't use any raw css in <style> tag.
